scrapedName: Uncover Northern Vietnam: Ha Giang By Scooter 7 Days

itinerary.title: Hanoi Arrival - Half Day City Tour By Bike
itinerary.description:
Morning

Upon arrival, you settle into your hotel and prepare for an exciting day ahead. At 08:00 or 13:00, our guide and driver will pick you up from your hotel. Before starting, the guide will provide essential safety instructions and ensure you are familiar with the itinerary. We will also take note of any dietary restrictions you may have to personalize your experience. As you ride along Hanoi, you will not only be able to explore must-see sights and hidden jewels from a local point of view but also watch how people in the city work, play, pray, and live their lives day after day

itinerary.title: Ha Giang - Quan Ba Heaven Gate - Yen Minh - Dong Van Town
itinerary.description:
Morning

Your second day starts at 08:30 when you meet our tour guide and easy rider team to get ready for the trip. After a detailed safety briefing and an overview of the day’s itinerary, you will set off from Ha Giang City. Just ten minutes outside the city, you will find yourself surrounded by breathtaking landscapes. Rivers, mountains, and small villages begin to emerge, offering stunning views that will stay with you throughout the day. The first major highlight is Bac Sum Pass, where you will stop at a viewpoint to admire the snake-like road winding through the valley

itinerary.title: Dong Van - Ma Pi Leng Pass - Nho Que River - Meo Vac - Du Gia Village
itinerary.description: Having finished your breakfast, you will get on an exciting journey through some of the most iconic and breathtaking landscapes of Northern Vietnam. Leaving Dong Van Town, you venture out Ma Pi Leng Pass, one of Vietnam’s legendary four great mountain passes. This 20-kilometre stretch, part of the renowned Happiness Road, links Ha Giang City, Dong Van, and Meo Vac town. As you navigate the winding route, the trip brings a mesmerizing panorama of rugged cliffs, green valleys, and the emerald-green waters of the Nho Que River, which cuts through a dramatic abyss below. A designated rest area alo...

itinerary.title: Du Gia - Bac Me - Ha Giang - Back to Hanoi
itinerary.description: You will kick off Day 4 at Du Gia, a beautiful village located in a picturesque valley adorned with expansive rice paddies, sprawling cornfields, and majestic high mountains that seem to touch the clouds. The scenery is extremely beautiful as you move past traditional houses with wooden walls and roofs, their courtyards filled with neatly stacked bundles of firewood, all enclosed by rustic stone fences. Your first highlight of today’s itinerary is Du Gia Waterfall, where clear, cool water cascades across rocky streams of varying sizes, creating a tranquil oasis amidst the greenery. The waterfa...

itinerary.title: Hanoi - Halong Bay Overnight Cruise
itinerary.description:
Morning

After an early breakfast, our driver will pick you up at 08:00 for a transfer to the cruise port in Halong Bay. On arrival, the friendly staff will assist you with the check-in process to ensure a smooth start. Around noon, you will be warmly welcomed aboard with a refreshing drink, followed by a brief orientation about the cruise and safety guidelines. As the ship sets sail into the secluded areas of the bay, you will indulge in a delightful lunch served on deck. Afternoon

The afternoon brings many exciting experiences, with activities like swimming in the emerald waters or kayaking...

itinerary.title: Halong Bay - Hanoi
itinerary.description:
Morning

On Day 6, you will begin your morning with a relaxing Tai Chi session on the sundeck. Focus on gentle movements and mindful breathing to start your day with a sense of peace and balance. For those who prefer a slower pace, feel free to sleep in and enjoy breakfast later. Afterward, the cruise will take you to see another key attraction here. At around 10:00, you will return to the ship to pack stuff and check out

itinerary.title: Hanoi Departure
itinerary.description: Today is the last day of this tour. You will have some spare time to eat breakfast at the hotel and enjoy the atmosphere of Hanoi before your flight home. At the announced time, we will transport you to the airport to take the return flight. We hope that you have had a great time during your journey with us!

highlights: Discover the must-see sights in Hanoi on a scooter
Traverse through the picturesque Ha Giang Province
Explore the enchanting karst plateaus and legendary passes
Immerse yourself in the rich culture of ethnic minority villages
Get on an overnight cruise in Halong Bay for relaxation out in the water
included: Accommodation in TWN/ DBL sharing accommodation at hotels & homestay
All transport within Vietnam (including airport pick up and see off), as per itinerary
Protective gear, helmet, rain-coat, Motorbikes, fuel
All in-tour stationed local English speaking guide.
Entrance fees for Vietnam attractions, as per itinerary
Meals as indicated in the program
importantNotes: PROGRAMS & SCHEDULES SUBJECT TO CHANGE WITHOUT PRIOR NOTICE
